changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert small test dataset: 7 days of events with variance for admin user's channels only (~2000 events)
changeSet.sql: -- Get admin user ID (first user with ADMIN role) WITH admin_user AS ( SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE role = 'ADMIN' ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 ), -- Generate time series with varying intervals to simulate realistic traffic patterns time_slots AS ( SELECT generate_series( (NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')::timestamptz, NOW()::timestamptz, INTERVAL '5 minutes' ) AS slot ), -- Random subset of time slots (roughly 50% to add variance) random_slots AS ( SELECT slot FROM time_slots WHERE random() < 0.5 ) INSERT INTO event (channel_id, severity, title, message, metadata, timestamp) SELECT c.id AS channel_id, -- Weighted severity: 70% OK, 20% WARNING, 10% CRITICAL CASE WHEN random() < 0.70 THEN 'OK' WHEN random() < 0.90 THEN 'WARNING' ELSE 'CRITICAL' END AS severity, -- Varied titles based on channel type CASE c.name WHEN 'Backend Errors' THEN (ARRAY['API Response', 'Database Query', 'Service Call', 'Cache Hit', 'Request Processed'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN 'Frontend Analytics' THEN (ARRAY['Page View', 'User Click', 'Form Submit', 'Navigation', 'Session Start'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN 'Deployment Events' THEN (ARRAY['Build Started', 'Tests Passed', 'Deploy Complete', 'Rollback', 'Health Check'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN 'Security Alerts' THEN (ARRAY['Login Attempt', 'Token Refresh', 'Access Denied', 'Rate Limited', 'Session Valid'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] ELSE (ARRAY['Event Received', 'Status Update', 'Metric Report', 'Heartbeat', 'Notification'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] END AS title, -- Detailed messages CASE WHEN random() < 0.1 THEN 'Critical issue detected - immediate attention required for ' || c.name WHEN random() < 0.3 THEN 'Warning threshold exceeded in ' || c.name || ' - monitoring closely' ELSE 'Normal operation for ' || c.name || ' - all systems nominal' END AS message, -- Rich metadata with variance jsonb_build_object( 'source', (ARRAY['api-server', 'worker-1', 'worker-2', 'scheduler', 'gateway'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int], 'channel_name', c.name, 'environment', (ARRAY['production', 'staging', 'development'])[FLOOR(random() * 3 + 1)::int], 'region', (ARRAY['us-east-1', 'eu-west-1', 'ap-southeast-1'])[FLOOR(random() * 3 + 1)::int], 'cpu_usage', ROUND((random() * 80 + 10)::numeric, 1), 'memory_mb', (random() * 4096)::int, 'response_time_ms', (random() * 500)::int, 'request_count', (random() * 1000)::int ) AS metadata, -- Add some jitter to timestamps (±2 minutes) rs.slot + (random() * INTERVAL '4 minutes' - INTERVAL '2 minutes') AS timestamp FROM channel c CROSS JOIN random_slots rs CROSS JOIN admin_user au WHERE c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.user_id = au.id ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert burst events to simulate incidents for admin's channels
changeSet.sql: -- Simulate 3 incident bursts in the last 7 days for realism WITH admin_user AS ( SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE role = 'ADMIN' ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 ), incident_times AS ( SELECT unnest(ARRAY[ NOW() - INTERVAL '6 days' + INTERVAL '14 hours', NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days' + INTERVAL '9 hours', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day' + INTERVAL '16 hours' ]) AS incident_start ), burst_events AS ( SELECT it.incident_start + (n * INTERVAL '30 seconds') AS event_time, n FROM incident_times it CROSS JOIN generate_series(0, 20) AS n ) INSERT INTO event (channel_id, severity, title, message, metadata, timestamp) SELECT c.id AS channel_id, CASE WHEN be.n < 5 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN be.n < 15 THEN 'WARNING' ELSE 'OK' END AS severity, CASE WHEN be.n < 5 THEN 'Incident Detected' WHEN be.n < 15 THEN 'Recovery In Progress' ELSE 'Service Restored' END AS title, CASE WHEN be.n < 5 THEN 'Critical incident detected in ' || c.name || ' - escalating to on-call team' WHEN be.n < 15 THEN 'Recovery actions in progress for ' || c.name || ' - monitoring metrics' ELSE 'Service fully restored for ' || c.name || ' - incident resolved' END AS message, jsonb_build_object( 'source', 'incident-detector', 'channel_name', c.name, 'incident_id', 'INC-' || LPAD((random() * 9999)::int::text, 4, '0'), 'severity_level', CASE WHEN be.n < 5 THEN 'P1' WHEN be.n < 15 THEN 'P2' ELSE 'P3' END, 'affected_users', (random() * 1000)::int ) AS metadata, be.event_time AS timestamp FROM channel c CROSS JOIN burst_events be CROSS JOIN admin_user au WHERE c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.user_id = au.id AND c.name IN ('Backend Errors', 'Security Alerts') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert test events for channels using generate_series. Creates 5 months of historical data at 5-second intervals with varied severities.
changeSet.sql: -- Insert events for all active channels using generate_series -- This creates events from 5 months ago to 1 month ago at 5-second intervals INSERT INTO event (channel_id, severity, title, message, metadata, timestamp) SELECT c.id AS channel_id, (ARRAY['OK', 'OK', 'OK', 'OK', 'OK', 'OK', 'OK', 'WARNING', 'WARNING', 'CRITICAL'])[FLOOR(random() * 10 + 1)::int] AS severity, 'Event at ' || TO_CHAR(stamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS title, 'Test event generated for channel ' || c.name || ' at ' || stamp AS message, jsonb_build_object( 'source', 'test-data-generator', 'channel_name', c.name, 'random_value', (random() * 1000)::int ) AS metadata, stamp AS timestamp FROM channel c CROSS JOIN LATERAL generate_series( (NOW() - INTERVAL '5 months')::timestamptz, (NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month')::timestamptz, INTERVAL '5 seconds' ) AS stamp WHERE c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.id IN ( -- Limit to first 3 channels to avoid excessive data SELECT id FROM channel WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY id LIMIT 3 ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert additional recent events for testing with higher frequency.
changeSet.sql: -- Insert more recent events (last month) at 1-minute intervals for all active channels INSERT INTO event (channel_id, severity, title, message, metadata, timestamp) SELECT c.id AS channel_id, (ARRAY['OK', 'OK', 'OK', 'OK', 'OK', 'WARNING', 'WARNING', 'CRITICAL'])[FLOOR(random() * 8 + 1)::int] AS severity, CASE WHEN random() < 0.1 THEN 'Critical alert triggered' WHEN random() < 0.3 THEN 'Warning threshold exceeded' ELSE 'System health check passed' END AS title, CASE WHEN random() < 0.1 THEN 'Critical issue detected in channel ' || c.name || '. Immediate attention required.' WHEN random() < 0.3 THEN 'Warning: Metrics approaching threshold in ' || c.name ELSE 'All systems nominal for ' || c.name END AS message, jsonb_build_object( 'source', 'test-data-generator', 'channel_name', c.name, 'cpu_usage', (random() * 100)::int, 'memory_usage', (random() * 100)::int, 'response_time_ms', (random() * 500)::int ) AS metadata, stamp AS timestamp FROM channel c CROSS JOIN LATERAL generate_series( (NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month')::timestamptz, NOW()::timestamptz, INTERVAL '1 minute' ) AS stamp WHERE c.status = 'ACTIVE' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
